articles.title: Halliburton (HAL) Lands Saudi Aramco Contracts For Unconventional Gas And Oil Re Entry
articles.summary: Halliburton secured multiple multi year contracts with Saudi Aramco to support unconventional gas development and onshore oil re entry work in Saudi Arabia. The agreements include the deployment of advanced intelligent automation and fracturing technologies and meaningfully expand Halliburton’s operational footprint in the country. These long duration contracts add to Halliburton’s international business exposure and deepen its role in Aramco’s upstream development plans. Halliburton,...
